# Skill scanner — exact-pinned. Regenerate the lockfile with:
#   pip install pip-tools
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes \
#     -o .github/scripts/requirements.lock \
#     .github/scripts/requirements.txt
# CI installs from the lockfile with `pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.lock`,
# never from this file directly.
cisco-ai-skill-scanner==2.0.9
anthropic==0.76.0
